name: Semax
summary: Semax is a synthetic heptapeptide derived from ACTH(4-10), used in Russia as a nootropic and neuroprotective agent for cognition, focus, and ischemic stroke recovery.
mechanism:
Semax is a synthetic seven-amino-acid peptide (Met-Glu-His-Phe-Pro-Gly-Pro) based on a fragment of adrenocorticotropic hormone (ACTH 4-10) with an added Pro-Gly-Pro tail that confers metabolic stability without ACTH's hormonal (cortisol-stimulating) activity. Its central action is rapid upregulation of brain-derived neurotrophic factor (BDNF) and nerve growth factor (NGF) mRNA and enhanced TrkB signaling, supporting neuroplasticity and neuronal survival. It also modulates dopaminergic, serotonergic, and cholinergic systems and inhibits enkephalin-degrading enzymes, prolonging enkephalin activity.

Although the parent peptide has a plasma half-life of only 2-5 minutes, its downstream neurotrophic and gene-expression effects persist for 12-24 hours, partly via the active metabolite Pro-Gly-Pro. In ischemic stroke models and Russian clinical use, Semax raises plasma BDNF and is associated with antioxidant, anti-excitotoxic, and anti-neuroinflammatory neuroprotection.
benefits: Upregulates BDNF and NGF, supporting neuroplasticity and memory
Improves focus, mental clarity, and cognitive performance (subjective and preclinical)
Neuroprotective in ischemic stroke (Russian clinical evidence)
Mild mood and stress-resilience benefits via neurotransmitter modulation
No classic stimulant crash; effects build with neurotrophic signaling
risks: Human clinical evidence is mostly Russian-language and not replicated in large Western trials
Not FDA-approved; quality and concentration of research-grade product vary
Long-term effects of chronic BDNF upregulation are not well characterized
sideEffects: Overstimulation, irritability, or restlessness at higher doses
Difficulty sleeping if dosed late in the day

dosage.notes: Standard intranasal Semax 200-600 mcg, 1-3x daily. Concentrated variants are dosed lower: NA-Semax (N-acetyl) ~1/2-1/3 the dose; NASA (Semax amidate) ~1/3-1/5. Onset 20-40 min, peak 1-2 h, duration 4-6 h subjectively.
dosage.timing: Dose 1-3x daily intranasally (one drop or metered spray per nostril per dose). Best taken AM and/or midday; because Semax is stimulating, avoid dosing late in the day to prevent disrupted sleep. Onset 20-40 min, peak 1-2 h.
dosage.maxDose: General nootropic use commonly capped around ~600-900 mcg/day. Higher daily totals (~9-18 mg/day of a 1% solution) appear only in acute Russian clinical stroke protocols under medical supervision and are not a self-directed nootropic ceiling.

steps.note: ~150 mcg per nostril, 1-2x daily (AM/midday); start low to assess stimulation.
Optional split into 2-3 doses across the day; representative Russian clinical neuroprotection range is 200-600 mcg/day. Western status is research-only (not FDA-approved).

halfLife: Plasma 2-5 minutes; downstream BDNF/NGF effects persist 12-24 hours
cycleLength: Often used in 2-4 week cycles with breaks; some use daily during cognitive or recovery demands

reconstitution.notes: A 10 mg vial in 2 mL yields 5 mg/mL; one drop or measured spray delivers the dose. Many users reconstitute directly into a metered nasal-spray bottle; calibrate spray volume so each actuation delivers the intended mcg. Bacteriostatic water or saline can be used for nasal delivery.

storage: Store lyophilized vial frozen; refrigerate (2-8 C) after reconstitution; nasal-spray solution best used within 2-4 weeks; protect from light and heat.
contraindications: Caution in severe anxiety/bipolar disorder due to stimulating effects

interactions.note: Commonly stacked: Semax provides stimulating, focus/BDNF-driven nootropic effects while Selank adds calming, anxiolytic balance; the pair offsets each other's edges (overstimulation vs. sedation).
Additive stimulation with caffeine, modafinil, or amphetamines may cause overstimulation or insomnia.

references.title: Semax and Pro-Gly-Pro Activate Transcription of Neurotrophins and Their Receptor Genes after Cerebral Ischemia (PMC)
The efficacy of semax in the treatment of patients at different stages of ischemic stroke (PubMed)
Semax: Cognitive Vitality For Researchers (Alzheimer's Drug Discovery Foundation)
A New Generation of Drugs: Synthetic Peptides Based on Natural Regulatory Peptides (Neuroscience & Medicine)
Semax Dosage Guide: Intranasal Protocols, BDNF Effects, and N-Acetyl Semax Amidate (OPTMZD)
